title: Better_Weapons
description: This resource pack refreshes Minecraft’s tools, weapons, armor, and key items with unique textures and improved models. Netherite gear gains gold and diamond-inspired accents, while shields, bows, tridents, and more receive detailed redesigns.
body:
# 🔥 What’s Included
## 🛠️ Reworked Tools & Weapons:

- Completely redesigned textures for all standard tools (swords, pickaxes, axes, shovels, 
  hoes);
- Sharper silhouettes and cleaner outlines to make tools easier to distinguish at a glance;

- Each material tier (Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite) gets its own identity while 
  staying consistent with the vanilla style;

- Metallic tools now feature more realistic shading and color depth for a polished, modern 
  look.

## ⚔️ Enhanced Netherite Gear:

- Netherite tools and weapons now include unique gold and diamond-inspired color accents,     
  making your late-game arsenal look truly legendary;

- More defined edges, improved contrast, and subtle glow-like highlights for a premium feel;

- Updated item visuals in both the UI and in-hand models for maximum detail.

## 🛡️ New Armor Models & Textures:

- Fully refreshed armor models for every armor set;

- Enhanced shapes for helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots — more depth, more detail, more 
  personality;

- Netherite armor includes new accent colors and refined plating for a more powerful, end-game appearance;

- Better readability in third-person view and on armor stands.

## 🎯 Additional Item Overhauls:

- Shield: New front design, more detailed borders, cleaner wood texture;

- Totem of Undying: Redesigned as a classic hardcore heart with a simple "+" sign on the bottom 
  left corner of it;

- Trident: A refreshed texture that stays faithful to the vanilla design while adding extra 
  depth, improved contrast, and clearer detailing.

- Bow & Crossbow: Updated pull animation textures, refreshed wood tones, and clearer 
  fabric/wrap details.

## 🧰 Extra Improvements:

- Updated item icons for improved readability in the inventory.

- Consistent lighting, contrast, and color themes across all revamped items.

- Faithful to the original Minecraft aesthetic — no extreme style changes.

## ⭐ Why Bother?

If you’re looking to make your tools, weapons, and armor feel more distinct, stylish, and satisfying, this pack delivers a complete visual refresh without breaking Minecraft’s original charm. Every texture has been redesigned with clarity, depth, and personality in mind — perfect for players who want their gear to look as powerful as it feels.

# INFO
## License details /  How must you use my project:
About the license of this resource pack, I allow players to modify, add, change, and give freedom to do whatever they want with this texture pack **only for their OWN personal liking. If the player were to publish their modified version of my texture pack without my permission and authorisation, or without requesting accreditation, I WILL demand a takedown of their project for copyright violations and infringement**. 
Please understand my motifs for such restricted actions players can make with my work, but after all have fun with my texture pack and if you want to give me advices on things to add/retexture or improve, please feel 100% free to comment.

Thanks for your understanding.
# COPPER UPDATE TODAY (12/02/26)
